name: agent-flow-workflow-plugin
description: Open Agent Flow in VS Code Simple Browser and focus workflow panes.

commands.title: Agent Flow: Start Server and Open Workflow
Agent Flow: Start Full Server Stack and Open Workflow
Agent Flow: Start PHP-WASM and Open Demo

agentFlow.workflowUrl.description: URL opened in VS Code Simple Browser for Agent Flow.

agentFlow.focusChatAfterOpen.description: Attempt to focus a chat view after opening the workflow browser.

agentFlow.startServerOnOpen.description: Start the local Agent Flow server command before opening the workflow URL.

agentFlow.startupWaitMs.description: Milliseconds to wait for the workflow URL to respond after starting the server command.

agentFlow.startupCommandWindows.description: Server startup command used on Windows in the Agent Flow terminal. Supports ${workspaceFolder}.

agentFlow.startupCommandUnix.description: Server startup command used on macOS/Linux in the Agent Flow terminal. Supports ${workspaceFolder}.

agentFlow.fullServerUrl.description: URL opened after starting the full server stack workflow.

agentFlow.fullServerStartupWaitMs.description: Milliseconds to wait for full server stack URL readiness.

agentFlow.fullServerCommandWindows.description: Startup command for full server stack on Windows. Supports ${workspaceFolder}.

agentFlow.fullServerCommandUnix.description: Startup command for full server stack on macOS/Linux. Supports ${workspaceFolder}.

agentFlow.phpWasmUrl.description: URL opened for the PHP-WASM demo server.

agentFlow.phpWasmStartupWaitMs.description: Milliseconds to wait for PHP-WASM URL readiness.

agentFlow.phpWasmCommandWindows.description: Startup command for PHP-WASM on Windows. Supports ${workspaceFolder}.

agentFlow.phpWasmCommandUnix.description: Startup command for PHP-WASM on macOS/Linux. Supports ${workspaceFolder}.
